description:
Kiran is the founder of the Shred Fix Program, a Certified Nutritionist, Health Coach, and Strength & Conditioning Coach from ISSA (USA). He holds a Diploma in Personal Training and Fitness from Active IQ, UK.

With 15 years of hands-on experience in fitness and healthcare, Kiran began his career in Dubai in 2010 and has been transforming lives ever since. Since 2020, he has been actively coaching and building his healthcare ecosystem in Bangalore.

He is widely known for his result-driven, personalized online coaching for fat loss, lifestyle diseases, and women’s health.

This channel is a contribution to educate the Kannada-speaking community with real, science-based health and fitness knowledge.


Services

Natural Aesthetics

Fat Loss & Body Recomposition

PCOS/PCOD Reversal & Women's Health

Diabetes Type 2 & Thyroid Management

Pain Rehab: Knee, Shoulder, Neck,Back

description:
Hi  I’m Rose, a certified nutrition coach and am fascinated by our health and lifestyle. 
My interest in healthy food and nutrition began around few years ago, It has evolved into me wanting to share my passion and knowledge with others to help them gain awareness of nutrition and build a sustainable wellness lifestyle!
It's about MORE than food! It’s about WHY you eat, HOW you eat, WHERE and with WHOM you eat, and how you feel as you eat when it come to food choices. It’s also about overall wellness, which includes water, sleep, stress, and self care! What you put in your body MATTERS!.
I have been physically active from past 5-6 years, by doing 5-6 days a week strength and functional training.  
I love sharing videos about healthy eating tips, nutritious recipes, fitness advice, styling and workouts to help you feel your absolute best.

Contact me : rosemarycp24@gmail.com
angle_to_take: Ask how she delivers recipes and wellness content today, whether subscribers come back weekly without the algorithm picking them, and where the resource sprawl lives. Frame the app as a branded wellness hub for her recipes, nutrition guidance, and lifestyle content—with push reminders and personalization so engaged viewers become retained members instead of drifting between uploads.

description:
Hi!  I'm Coach Tina Tang - Plyo Queen,  a fit at 55 online fitness coach who helps women 40+ add strength training & plyometrics into their life.

Grab my FREE Beginner Strength Training Cheat Sheet here: https://bit.ly/beginner-strength-cheat-sheet

I share fitness & health tips as well as share menopause advice.  I went through menopause in the dark, not knowing what was going on because my mom (who comes from the generation taught now to talk about it) never shared her experiences and I had doctors who also weren't menopause educated.  I'm going to change that so you don't have to struggle alone!

XO, Coach Tina

Other places to find me:
My podcast, Tina’s SurThrival Guide to Health over 40: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/tinas-surthrival-guide-to-health-over-40/id1679069819

description:
I have this wild idea that if I can help women reclaim their bodies from the diet industry, they just might reclaim their lives, minds, and families, FOR GOOD.

After years of failed dieting, weight gain, and frustration, I decided to try something different. 

New habits like flexible eating and strength training, combined with more belief and stronger self-love have led me to lose 100lb and keep it off, forever. 

This channel will answer your questions and resolve your pain points around nutrition, diet, training, exercise, sleep, hydration, stress, sex, and a sustainable fitness lifestyle.

You got this 🤞🏾👑

Follow Me on IG @kwnfitbykira, and look for new videos every week! 

For collaborations and inquiries, email kwnfit@gmail.com
